##NAMES=Dixenite
##RRUFFID=R100044
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Cu^1+^Fe^3+^Mn^2+^_14_(As^5+^O_4_)(As^3+^O_3_)_5_(SiO_4_)_2_(OH)_6_
##LOCALITY=Moss mine, Nordmark, Varmland, Sweden
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=William W Pinch
##DESCRIPTION=Thin tabular reddish-brown hexagonal plates, associated with synadelphite and colorless or grey allactite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
